evaluators.name: Timed Saturday General Admission Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user booked 2 adults and 1 child for a Saturday afternoon general admission in May 2026 at the earliest available slot at or after 15:00, added it to the cart, and viewed the visit summary.

evaluators.name: Pre-1500 European Self-Guided Route Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for pre-1500 European exhibits with short visit times, added 4 qualifying exhibits from 4 different countries under 90 minutes total to their route, and viewed the route overview.

evaluators.name: Longest English Guided Tour Under 25€ Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered English guided tours on a date in August 2026 with a max price of 25€, booked the longest qualifying tour for 1 adult, and viewed the booking review.

evaluators.name: Cheese Aging Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for aging & maturation articles around 1800–1950 with <=10 minute reading time, added 3 qualifying articles to their reading list, and viewed the list.

evaluators.name: Family Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for June 2026 weekend morning workshops for ages 8–12 under 40€ per participant, booked a qualifying family workshop for 1 adult and 2 children, and viewed the registration review.

evaluators.name: Pinned Timeline Events Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used the ancient and modern year ranges, pinned 3 events between ~2000 BCE and 1 CE and 2 events between 1900 and 1950 CE, and opened the My Timeline view.

evaluators.name: Cheese Books Cart and Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for appropriate paperback cheese history and science books, added 2 qualifying European history paperbacks and 1 qualifying modern science paperback to the cart, viewed the cart, and selected standard domestic shipping.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed visitor@example.com with monthly digest in English, selected at least the Ancient Cheese History and Museum Events & Workshops interests, and completed the follow-up preferences step.
